original_image_tags: The page is the back side of a thin, semi-translucent "onion skin" type paper. The typed text from the reverse side is visible through the paper, but appears mirrored (reversed). The page has two punch holes at the top. There are multiple ink stamps at the bottom, some of which are also mirrored.

elements.description: Page shows faint, reversed mirrored typed text from the reverse side of a document, along with two hole-punch marks at the top edge. The bottom area contains multiple ink stamps and a handwritten annotation. Two distinct blue ink stamps read 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'F.B.I.', 'SEC. ESPIONAGE', along with dates/times such as 'AUG 2 9 59 AM 51' and 'JUL 30 4 08 PM 51'. A vertical handwritten pencil annotation reads 'Rec'd 12/20/45'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of reversed text, two punch holes, and multiple bottom ink stamps, but Description B adds specific stamp text, a handwritten annotation, and specific dates/times not mentioned in A.
